items.situation: two friends figuring out a bus or train schedule for a day trip

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Did you figure out how we're getting to the coast on Saturday? I keep going back and forth between the bus and the train.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I checked this morning. The train's faster, only about an hour, but the first one doesn't leave until nine.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Nine? That's too late. I wanted to be at the beach by mid-morning.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Then the bus is better. It leaves at seven-thirty, though it takes almost two hours.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Two hours is fine if we're on our way early. Let's just grab the seven-thirty bus.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sounds good. I'll book the tickets online tonight so we don't have to line up.

questions.stem: According to the man, what is the drawback of taking the train?

options.A: Its earliest departure is at nine o'clock
options.B: It costs more than the bus does
options.C: It takes them almost two hours
options.D: It only runs on the weekdays

questions.explanation: 男生说火车虽然快（约一小时），但第一班要到九点才发车，这正是它的缺点，故A正确。B（比公交贵）对话中从未提及，属于相关但未陈述。C（要将近两小时）是公交车的特征，被错误地安到了火车上，属于张冠李戴。D（只在工作日运行）与对话事实不符，是被篡改的细节。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do tonight?

options.A: Take the train to the coast
options.C: Purchase the tickets on the internet
options.D: Cancel the trip to the beach

questions.explanation: 男生在最后明确说今晚会在网上订票，以免排队，因此可推断他今晚会上网买票，C正确。A（坐火车去海岸）是两人已经否决的方案，他们选了公交车，属于被否决选项。B（七点半前起床）是出行当天的事，与今晚要做的动作无关。D（取消去海滩）与对话积极筹划的语气完全相反，属于过度推断。

items.situation: two students planning what cheese and food to buy for a dinner party

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Have you thought about what cheeses we should get for Friday's dinner party? I want a good spread.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Definitely something soft, like brie, and maybe a sharp cheddar for people who don't like the fancy stuff.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Good call. Oh, and we'll need crackers and some grapes to go with them.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Right. I can pick up the crackers and fruit on my way home tomorrow.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Perfect. I'll handle the cheeses then, since the shop by my place has a huge selection.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Great. Let's just keep it simple so we're not cooking all afternoon.

questions.stem: What does the man offer to bring to the party?
questions.explanation: 男生说他明天回家路上可以顺便买饼干和水果，故B正确。A（各种软奶酪）其实是女生揽下的任务，被错误地安到了男生头上，属于张冠李戴。C（几瓶红酒）对话中从未提及，属于相关但未陈述。D（纸盘和餐巾）同样没有被提到，也属于相关但未陈述。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do before the party?

options.A: Bake a dessert for the guests
options.C: Ask the man to buy the cheese
options.D: Buy the cheeses near her home

questions.explanation: 女生说她来负责奶酪，因为她家附近的店选择很多，因此可推断她会在自家附近买奶酪，D正确。A（烤甜点）对话完全没有涉及，属于无关的后续动作。B（取消聚会）与两人积极筹备的情境相反，属于过度推断。C（让男生去买奶酪）与她主动揽下奶酪任务相矛盾，属于被否决选项。

items.situation: two friends coordinating a weekend hiking or beach trip

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Are you still up for hiking Ridgeline Trail this weekend, or should we push it to next week?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I'm definitely in for Saturday. The forecast looks clear and warm all morning.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Nice. Should we start early? I heard the parking lot fills up fast on sunny days.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, let's meet at the trailhead by eight. That way we beat the crowds and the heat.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Sounds great. I'll bring extra water and some snacks for both of us.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: And I'll drive, so you won't have to worry about finding a second parking spot.

questions.stem: Why does the woman suggest starting early?

options.A: The trail closes in the afternoon
options.B: It is expected to rain later on
options.C: The parking lot fills up quickly
options.D: The man has plans that evening

questions.explanation: 女生说她听说晴天时停车场很快就满，所以建议早点出发，故C正确。A（步道下午关闭）对话未提及，属于相关但未陈述。B（晚些会下雨）与男生所说天气晴朗温暖的预报相矛盾，属于被篡改的细节。D（男生晚上有安排）对话中没有依据，属于相关但未陈述。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about how they will get to the trail?

options.A: They will travel together in the man's car
options.B: They will each drive there separately
options.C: They will take a bus to the trailhead
options.D: They will cancel because of the weather

questions.explanation: 男生说他来开车，这样女生就不用再操心找第二个停车位，由此可推断两人会一起坐男生的车前往，A正确。B（各自开车）与男生提出的只开一辆车相矛盾，属于被否决选项。C（坐公交去）对话从未提及，属于无关的后续动作。D（因天气取消）与预报晴朗、两人积极约定相反，属于过度推断。

items.situation: two friends sharing cooking tips while grocery shopping

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Wait, you're buying dried basil? For your pasta sauce, fresh basil makes a huge difference.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Really? I always just grab the jar. I figured they taste basically the same.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Not even close. Add the fresh leaves at the very end, off the heat, so they don't turn bitter.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Off the heat, got it. What about the garlic? Mine always ends up burnt and harsh.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Lower the flame and cook it slowly. Burnt garlic is what ruins most homemade sauces.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Wow, I've been doing everything wrong. I'll grab the fresh basil and try your way tonight.

questions.stem: What is the conversation mainly about?

options.A: Choosing which store has the freshest produce
options.B: Deciding what to cook for a dinner party
options.C: Comparing the prices of fresh and dried herbs
options.D: Tips for making a better pasta sauce

questions.explanation: 整段对话中女生在教男生怎样把意面酱做得更好——用新鲜罗勒、离火再加叶子、小火慢煎大蒜，主旨就是做酱的技巧，故D正确。A（挑哪家店食材最新鲜）是另一个校园话题，对话并未讨论，属于跑题。B（决定为晚宴做什么菜）同样未涉及，属于跑题。C（比较新鲜与干香草的价格）只抓住了新鲜与干罗勒这一细节，且把重点误读为价格，格局太窄。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do?

options.A: Keep using dried basil as before
options.B: Put fresh basil into his cart
options.C: Ask the woman to cook for him
options.D: Give up making pasta sauce entirely

questions.explanation: 男生最后说他会去拿新鲜罗勒，今晚照女生的方法试试，因此可推断他会把新鲜罗勒放进购物车，B正确。A（继续用干罗勒）与他打算改用新鲜罗勒相矛盾，属于被否决选项。C（让女生替他做饭）对话没有任何依据，属于无关的后续动作。D（彻底放弃做意面酱）与他跃跃欲试的态度相反，属于过度推断。

items.situation: two students swapping music recommendations because one is bored of the same pop singers

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Honestly, I'm so tired of the same pop singers on every playlist. Everything sounds identical lately.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Then you should check out this indie folk band, River and Stone. Totally different, really mellow guitar stuff.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hmm, folk isn't usually my thing. Is it slow and sleepy?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Not at all. Their newer album has an upbeat, almost jazzy feel. Start with the track 'Paper Boats.'

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Okay, that actually sounds interesting. I'll give that one a listen on the walk home.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Trust me, by next week you'll have their whole album on repeat.

questions.stem: How does the man describe the band's newer album?
questions.explanation: 男生说他们较新的专辑轻快、几乎带点爵士味，故A正确。B（缓慢安静又放松）是女生担心的那种沉闷风格，被男生直接否定，属于被篡改的细节。C（像流行乐一样吵闹有劲）与专辑轻快带爵士味的描述不符，属于被篡改的细节。D（悲伤而深情）对话中从未提及，属于相关但未陈述。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do on her way home?

options.A: Delete all of her pop playlists
options.B: Buy tickets to the band's concert
options.C: Listen to the song the man suggested
options.D: Keep replaying the same pop singers

questions.explanation: 女生说这听起来挺有意思，回家路上会听一下男生推荐的那首歌，故C正确。A（删掉所有流行歌单）比她表达的只是想换换口味走得太远，属于过度推断。B（买乐队的演唱会门票）对话没有依据，属于无关的后续动作。D（继续反复听那些流行歌手）与她已厌倦并愿意尝试新风格相矛盾，属于被否决选项。
